title: Contact: LoveRekindled
description: Send parcels and write postcards to your frineds.
body:
This is a un unofficial ported version of [Contact](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/contact), fully complying with the original mod's license terms.

#### Description

Postcard – Works just like a Book and Quill, allowing you to write messages. Comes in a variety of preset designs, and you can even create your own custom postcard styles. ([Example](https://github.com/Flechazo098/Contact/blob/arch-1.21.1/example/en_us.json)) Postcards can be purchased from the Wandering Trader. Once sent, their contents can no longer be changed.

Wrapping Paper – Right-click to wrap items. Provides 4 internal inventory slots.

Mailbox – Used for receiving mail. Sneak-right-click with an empty hand to link it to yourself. You’ll get a notification whenever new mail arrives.

Central Mailbox – A public mailbox for players without a personal one. Only server operators can place it.

Postbox – Send letters or parcels here. The recipient’s name can auto-complete, though it may not always be accurate.

Ender Mail – Delivered instantly to the recipient.

Got a new idea for a postcard background? Reach out and I can add it to the mod.

***

_This mod always requires the latest version of OELib/Jupiter and Architectury API as dependencies,If you encounter bugs, please update to the latest version._
